nadir.desc: The nadir view shows a wooded property containing a single structure|Portions of the roof appear to consist of different roofing materials or coverings|A paved driveway extends along the western side of the structure and appears capable of accommodating multiple vehicles|An additional paved area is visible near the rear of the property on the eastern side of the building|A sidewalk runs along the front of the property and connects to a shorter walkway leading to the front entrance|Trees and vegetation border both sides and the rear of the property|Multiple piles of wood and logs are visible throughout the backyard area|The front yard is generally open, with three tree stumps visible near the front of the property.

alpha.desc: The alpha view shows the property from the south|A driveway extends to an attached vehicle storage area with windows positioned above the doors|Two windows are visible on the upper level above this portion of the structure|A walkway connects the driveway to the front entrance|A large window is located adjacent to the front door|The area west of the structure is generally open and contains several visible objects and materials|Vegetation occupies the area between this open space and the front sidewalk.

bravo.desc: The bravo view shows the western side of the structure|A fence separates the front and rear portions of the property along this side|A door and a small window are visible on the western side of the attached vehicle storage area.

charlie.desc: The charlie view shows the property from the north, overlooking the backyard|Mature trees and vegetation occupy much of the rear portion of the property|A small detached structure is visible near the rear paved area|Multiple piles of wood and logs are distributed throughout the backyard|Additional materials and objects, including metal items, wood, and equipment, are visible near the rear property boundary|Several large box-shaped objects are located in the northwestern corner of the property|A large sliding door is visible on the rear façade of the structure.

delta.desc: The delta view shows the eastern side of the property|A chimney is visible along the eastern side of the structure near the front portion of the building.
